title: Japanese Pan-Seared Dumplings
description: A simple and savory recipe for pan-seared Japanese dumplings, served with a side of steamed rice.

ingredients.name: Rich soy sauce
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Japanese dumplings to the skillet and pan-fry until golden brown on the bottom, about 2-3 minutes.
Flip the dumplings over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until they are cooked through and crispy on the bottom.
Transfer the dumplings to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the rich soy sauce, gooey honey, and rice vinegar (if using).
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 1-2 minutes, until it has thickened slightly.
To serve, place a few dumplings on a plate, top with steamed rice, and drizzle with the soy sauce mixture.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds (if using).
